title: BTWR: Core
description: The core mod for the Better Than Wolves:Remastered! Modpack.
body:
This is the foundational mod for the Better Than Wolves: Remastered! (BTWR) modpack.

It overhauls and expands core Minecraft systems in the spirit of the original Better Than Wolves, while adding new mechanics, items, and challenges for a deeper survival experience.
--- ##
✨ Key Features and Additions:
### **🧟 Creeper & Mob Mechanics** + **Creeper Shearing:** Neutralize creepers with shears to acquire unique drops. Supports vanilla and custom creepers. + **Knockback Rules:** Only attacks with weapons/sprinting attacks (club, sword, bow, crossbow, trident) apply knockback by default. + **Baby Zombie Spawning Control:** Option to disable baby zombies entirely. ### **🍲 Food & Crafting** + **Expanded Food Selection:** New meals like Hearty Stew, Chowder, Chicken Soup, Omelettes, Kebab, and more. + **Diamond Plate & Armor Recipes:** Optional recipes for crafting diamond armor using Diamond Plates. + **Cut & Tanned Leather:** Multiple leather types with corresponding recipes. ### **🛡️ Gameplay & Survival Tweaks** + **Creeper Explosion Adjustments:** Explosions now calculate from the creeper’s eyes, giving more predictable outcomes. ### **🌳 World & Environment Enhancements** + **Mob Spawn Control on Wood:** Prevent mobs from spawning on wooden blocks. + **Spawn Capacity Tweaks:** Optional increase in monster spawn capacity per chunk. --- ##
💻 Developer API & Configuration
+ **Custom Textures for Sheared Creepers:** Mods can provide sheared variants for compatibility with creeper shearing. + **Configurable Options:** Full integration with Mod Menu for intuitive singleplayer and client-side configuration screens. --- ### 🧩 Side Mods Released: + [🌲 Sturdy Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/sturdy-trees) + [🏔️ Tough Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-environment) + [⚔️ Mobs Always Drop](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobs-always-drop) + [🏃‍♂️ Im 'movens](https://modrinth.com/mod/im-movens) + [💧 Hardcore Fluid Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-fluid-overhaul) + [🌑 In The Gloom](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-the-gloom) + [⛏️ Bind](https://modrinth.com/mod/bind) + [⚙️ Better With Time: HC Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/bwt-hc-tweaks) + [🐄 Animageddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/animageddon) + [🌱 Vegehenna](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegehenna) + [🔥 Self-Sustainable](https://modrinth.com/mod/self-sustainable) + [🛌 Nomad's Rest](https://modrinth.com/mod/nomads-rest) + [🧱 Piston Packing](https://modrinth.com/mod/piston-packing) --- **🖼️ Logo License:** The logo used for this mod is a modified version of the original BTW Logo and is licensed under the [CC-BY 4.0 License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en). **🙏 Acknowledgment:** This mod is a substantial adaptation and ports features from the original Better Than Wolves, created by FlowerChild and currently maintained by the CE Team. Learn more about the original mod [here](https://btwce.com/).
